title: New year, new coat of Weatherprufe Paints
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - For your weatherproofing needs, look no further than Weatherprufe Paints. We are well into the new year, a good time for a new coat of paint.


> WeatherPrufe Paints, which offers Elastocryl, is a fully South African, privately-owned paint and waterproofing manufacturer. Its products are created specifically for coastal conditions. WeatherPrufe has been supplying paint for large housing complexes in Mossel Bay and the surrounding areas for years.


Customers can choose from more than 50 high quality standard products, formulated to provide the very best protection against moisture and the elements.

On surfaces where many of the traditional waterproofing systems have failed, WeatherPrufe Paints uses Elastocryl pure acrylic systems, perfect for long-term waterproofing of concrete roofs, parapet walls and the areas around windows, as well as underground waterproofing.

Elastocryl is applied by hand and provides an optimal protective layer that is sun and water resistant, and will provide up to a 10-year warranty of excellent protection.


> The staff at WeatherPrufe pride themselves in the technical integrity of their products and are committed to the maintenance of the high standard set.


Thousands of projects have been successfully completed with Weatherprufe's outstanding products, with savings of 30% to 40% less than the prices of large companies.

Schalk Brits, the legendary former Springbok rugby player, trusted WeatherPrufe Paints for his own home improvements. Join Schalk in choosing South Africa's tried and trusted paint and waterproofing solutions for your next project.

Contact Dawid Wandrag (082 977 7802), Mark Groenewald (083 278 7898) or the WeatherPrufe branch (087 164 6086) for a free quotation today.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
